session_context: Agent observed authentication failures with no error logging during JWT implementation

expected_issue.title: Add error logging for authentication failures
expected_issue.context: Authentication failures currently fail silently with no logging. When users report login issues, there's no visibility into whether it's a wrong password, expired token, or system error. This makes debugging production issues difficult and increases support burden. Adding structured logging would improve observability and reduce time-to-resolution for auth issues.
acceptance_criteria: Failed auth attempts logged with user identifier (email or ID)
Logs include timestamp, failure reason (invalid password, expired token, etc.)
Logs use structured format (JSON) for easy parsing
constraints: Don't log sensitive data like passwords or full tokens
